body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
This adds the energy of falling rain to the snow energy fluxes.

It also establishes a function which returns this energy flux for rain and snow. This function can be extended for coupled simulations to pass the energy flux as computed by the atmosphere. However, since we do not have that method yet, I did not specialize to the `atmos::PrescribedAtmosphere` type.

title: add energy from rain to snow

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
In our simulations, we have the cache variables "atmos_energy_flux" and "atmos_water_flux". While useful for tracking conservation (see the experiment script and plot in buildkite that this PR changes), we dont need to store them in the cache. we can compute this after the fact from our other variables in `p`.
